category_sources: source_facts.description expands MALLET as MAchine Learning for LanguagE Toolkit.
source_facts.executables includes classification, vector, and topic-modeling tools.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description uses the acronym expansion MAchine Learning for LanguagE Toolkit.
source_facts.homepage points to the official Mallet project site.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Mallet project documentation site.
source_facts.repo identifies the official GitHub repository, whose README is an official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/mimno/Mallet, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies it as a machine-learning language toolkit.
source_facts.executables includes classifier, vectors, and topics commands.
